notes: Phase 2 locks the project name as Multiverse Codex and records the product promise, tone, audience, public/private split, core content vocabulary, and minimum viable launch target.
docs/project/content-types.md is now the canonical Phase 2 vocabulary source for worlds, characters, artifacts, factions, stories, chapters, timeline events, media assets, and entity relationships.
scripts/check_phase_identity.py validates the identity docs and is wired into the professional CI lane.
The professional lane remains the canonical phase-close gate and now checks Phase 2 spec, closure, golden, content vocabulary, and identity smoke before closure.
Phase 3 is the next candidate phase: SvelteKit App Scaffold.
